Description: Manatee shall be safe to handle, both in and out of the water
Motivation: A safe to handle vehicle will protect people handling it, as well as the vehicle itself.

Description: Manatee's research sensors shall be easy to decouple from the rest of the vehicle
Motivation: Sensors used in research deployments should be easily mounted and removed between deployments

Description: All electrical and mechanical features shall be securely fixtured
Motivation: Temporary fixturing techniques like tape and weak electrical connections frequently disconnect and compromise operation

Description: Manatee's electrical systems shall be validated for continuous operation
Motivation: To avoid overheating, excessive power drain, and component damage during sustained operation
